methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.openeye_util.OpenEyeUtil.OpenEyeUtil.__processTemplate
documentation:
Read the input HTML template data file and perform the key/value substitutions in the
input parameter dictionary.

```
Params

parameterDict: dictionary where
key = name of subsitution placeholder in the template and
value = data to be used to substitute information for the placeholder

Returns

string representing entirety of content with subsitution placeholders now replaced with data
```

classes.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebApp

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebApp.__init__
documentation:
Create an instance of `EntityWebApp` to manage a entity fixer web request.

> ```
> param 
>
> dictionary storing parameter information from the web request.
> Storage model for GET and POST parameter data is a dictionary of lists.
>
> param 
>
> boolean flag to activate verbose logging.
>
> param 
>
> stream for logging.
> ```

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebApp.doOp
documentation:
Execute request and package results in response dictionary.

:Returns:
     A dictionary containing response data for the input request.
     Minimally, the content of this dictionary will include the
     keys: CONTENT_TYPE and REQUEST_STRING.

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebApp.__dumpRequest
documentation:
Utility method to format the contents of the internal parameter dictionary
containing data from the input web request.

```
Returns

list of formatted text lines
```
Handle request and response object processing for the entity fixer tool application.

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker.__init__
documentation:
Worker methods for the chemical component editor application

Performs URL - application mapping and application launching
for chemical component editor tool.

All operations can be driven from this interface which can
supplied with control information from web application request
or from a testing application.

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker.doOp
documentation:
Map operation to path and invoke operation.

:Returns:

Operation output is packaged in a ResponseContent() object.

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker.setLogHandle
documentation: Reset the stream for logging output.

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker.__doOpNoException
documentation:
Map operation to path and invoke operation.  No exception handling is performed.

:Returns:

Operation output is packaged in a ResponseContent() object.

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker.__doOpException
documentation:
Map operation to path and invoke operation.  Exceptions are caught within this method.

:Returns:

Operation output is packaged in a ResponseContent() object.

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker._StandaloneOp
documentation: Launch PRD search module first-level interface (standalone)

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker._WorkflowOp
documentation: Launch PRD search module first-level interface (workflow)

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker._checkRunningStatusOp
documentation: Performs a check on the contents of a semaphore file and returns the associated status

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker._updatePRD
documentation: Update PRD based on interface input

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker._exit_Finished
documentation: Exiting Entity Transform Module when annotator has completed all necessary processing

methods.name: wwpdb.apps.entity_transform.webapp.EntityWebApp.EntityWebAppWorker.__updateWfTrackingDb
documentation:
Private function used to udpate the Workflow Status Tracking Database

```
Params

p_status: the new status value to which the deposition data set is being set

Helpers

wwpdb.apps.ccmodule.utils.WfTracking.WfTracking

Returns

bSuccess: boolean indicating success/failure of the database update
```
